titleStmt.title: SII 22.140: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 140. (A.R. No. 140 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, ELVĀNĀŚŪR. GRĀMĀRDHANĀTHA TEMPLE—IN THE SAME PLACE. PAR. TRIBH. RĀJARĀJADĒVA (II)—15th YEAR (A.D. 1160-61).

summary.p: The inscription is damaged in places. It begins with introduction Pūmaruviya Tirumādum etc. Details of the date are given as Mēsha, śu. 8, Wednesday, Pushya corresponding to A.D. 1161, April 5.

It seems to record an endowment both in money and in land by the Kiḷiyūr Malaiyamān chief Periyuḍaiyāṉ Sūryadēvaṉ alias Chōḷēndraśiṅga-Malaiyakularāyaṉ for providing for the various requirements (specified in detail) connected with the worship and offerings in the temple of Ūrbāgaṅkoṇḍaruḷiya-Nāyanār at Iṟaiyānaraiyūr on the days of festival in the months of Paṅguṉi and Puraṭṭādi and also on other important occasions. Reference is made probably to a remission of the kuḍimai and pāḍikāval taxes on the lands at the hamlet Puliyuṇṇipāḍi to the north of Iṟaiyānaraiyūr.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūmaruviya tirumātum puvimātu
m jayamātum nāmaruviya kalaimātum
pukaḻmātum nayantu rulka varumaṟai
vitineṟi yanaittun taḻaippa varumu
ṟai Urimaiyil maṇimuṭi cūṭin tiṅkaḷ
veṇkuṭai ticaikaḷiṟeṭṭuṉ taṅku
tanikkūṭaṉ tānena vi lippa
ṭṭiyaic ceṅkol parappap poruṅkati
rāḻi puvivaḷarntuṭan vara villavariraṭṭar(mina)
minavar ciṅkaṇar pallavar nutaliyar pārtti
var paṇiya Eṇṇaruṅ kaṟpa maṇṇakam puṇarn=ta
cempon virasiṅhāsanattup puvanamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟirun=taru
ḷiya kopparakesaripanmarāna tribhuvanac cakravart
tikaḷ śrīrājarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 5vatu me
ṣanāyaṟṟu pūrvaśakṣattu Aṣṭamiyum putaṉki
ḻamaiyum peṟṟa pūcattināḷ malāṭāna jananātha
vaḷanāṭṭu pānūrkūṟṟattu brahmadeyam miṟaiyā
naraiyūrāna śrīcoḻakeraḷaccaturvedimaṅkalattu
Uṭaiyār Ūrpākaṅkoṇṭaruḷiyanāyanāṟku ki
ḷiyūr malaiyamān periyuṭaiyān cūriyatevanāna
coḷentraciṅka malaiyakularāyaṉ ceyta dharmamāvatu ti
rupaṅkuni tirunāḷ tiruveḻuccippaṭikku tirukkāp
punāṇ cāttiyaruḷa pon Araikkālāḷuṭaiya nā
cciyāṟku pon paṉṉiraṇṭu miravai ca[ ntikku A] rici Aṟu nāḻiyum tiru
p puṇyāhamum paṇṇabrāhmaṇar Aivaṟkarici kuṟuṇi Irunāḻiyum pā
veṟṟilaippaṟṟup pattu tirukkāppu nāṇ
tiruviḷakkeṇṇai muppati nāḻi kaṟiyamutu
veḻicci tirumantrapponakattukkarici mukkuṟuṇiyum ṭṭāti
muppatin kaḻañcu nāḷiraṇṭukku ceṅkaḻunir tiruppaḷḷit tāmam nālāyiram dā
nam paṇṇiyaruḷa Arici patakkirunāḻi Uppirunāḻi Eḷḷirunāḻi rupatin pa
ney nāḻi mañcāṭi caivvācāriyaṟku ci
pāl 8- marakkāl tiruvamutarici kalam kaṟiyamutu niṟai muta
Uḷḷiṭṭana Iravaikkamutupaṭi Arici kuṟuṇi Ūṟkeḻun=takuḷu
kaikku tālamutupaṭi yarici kuṟuṇi nānāḻi kaṟiyamutuḷḷiṭṭa na
yamutukkaricik kuṟuṇi karuppukkaṭṭi muppatinpalam ney yuḻakku
kkamutukku Arici tūṇippatakku kaṟiyamutuḷḷiṭṭu
ṭṭāti tirunāḷaḻivu ceyyakkaṭavatākavum Amāvāsitoṟu
Arici mukkuṟuṇi kaṟiyamutuḷḷiṭṭana Āka Ippaṭi cantrādityavaṟ cellak kaṭavatā
ka niman=tam Ivūr vaṭapiṭākai puliyuṇṇipāṭiyil bhārgavan śrīkraṣṇan
sūriyadevan bhāryyai nili śrīvanappiḷḷaiyāṇṭāḷum bhārgavan cen=tan ca
krapāṇiyum Innāyanār śrīpātattile Utakam paṇṇina taṟa nilattil
kuṭimaiyum pāṭikāvalu Iṭṭu koḷḷakkaṭavaral
lātatāka m candrādityavaṟ cellakkaṭavutāka kalveṭṭiṭṭuvittu viṭ
ṭān kiḷiyūr malaiyamān periya Uṭaiyān cūriyatevanāna coḷentra ciṅka malaiya
kularājaṉ Itu panmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 22.140 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
